title: VS: Gearworks
description: A Trackwork extension, adding landing gears for small scale planes
body:
# Gearwork

Gearwork is a Trackwork addon focused on one practical goal: better landing gear for vehicles.

Many players wanted smaller wheels and a simple, readable deploy/retract motion.  
Gearwork adds exactly that, with a lightweight design that fits naturally into Create + Trackwork style builds.

## What It Adds

- Compact landing gear parts for tighter vehicle designs
- Simple landing gear deployment/retraction animation
- A clean base for future vehicle mobility features

## Why Gearwork

Vanilla-sized wheel setups can feel too large for many aircraft and compact creations.  
Gearwork gives builders a cleaner silhouette and easier animation behavior for everyday use.

## Current Version Target

- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Forge 47.x
- Valkyrien Skies 2.3 branch (2.4 support is being considered for later updates)

## Dependencies

- Create 0.5.1-j
- Trackwork 1.1.1
- Valkyrien Skies 2.3.0+

## Notes

- This project is an addon, not a replacement for Trackwork.
- Please install all required dependencies before launching.

## Credits

- Trackwork by Endal
- Model Assets By Kipti
- Create and Valkyrien Skies teams
